message:
chore: ignore .codex-target/ and benchmark_report_* ephemeral files

Add two patterns to .gitignore:
- .codex-target/ — Codex IDE build artifact directory
- benchmark_report_*.json and benchmark_report_*.html — timestamped
  benchmark output generated by comprehensive_bench, accumulating
  dozens of files per day

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,11 +108,16 @@ flamegraph*.svg
 
 # Codex build artifacts and ephemeral directories
 target-codex*/
+.codex-target/
 .codex-target-arc/
 .codex-local-check/
 .codex-bench/
 .codex-tmp/
 
+# Benchmark reports (generated by comprehensive_bench)
+benchmark_report_*.json
+benchmark_report_*.html
+
 # Ephemeral agent scratch files
 bead_comment.md
 new_version
